Source: Salesforce Releases
URL: https://www.salesforce.com/releases/
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Salesforce Spring '26 Release

## Status
Spring '26 Release is now live, delivering "AI-driven innovation across every cloud and industry."

## Primary Theme
"The Spring '26 release enables companies to accelerate their journey toward becoming an Agentic Enterprise by combining human expertise with AI productivity."

## Featured Products & Updates
- Agentforce — Enhanced agent efficiency and support experiences; Agentforce Voice innovations
- Sales Cloud — Account prioritization and partner alignment tools
- Service Cloud — Early issue resolution and escalation reduction
- Field Service & Operations — Faster information capture; voice command support
- Marketing Cloud — AI-powered engagement with real-time responses
- Commerce — Personalized shopping experiences and operational optimization
- Analytics — Data-driven decision making
- Flow — Automation scaling enhancements
- Platform — DevOps and security feature improvements
- Industry clouds — Health, Education, Nonprofit, Automotive, Communications
- Slack — Included in product demo collections
- Revenue Management — Included in product demo collections

## Webinar Schedule (2026)

### Upcoming Live Event
- 3/3/26: "Build, Scale, Monetize: The ISV Strategy for Salesforce Spring '26" — Partner-focused deep dive on platform innovations

### On-Demand Webinars Available
- Agentforce Voice innovations
- Marketing Cloud Spring '26 features
- Field Service Innovation Review (includes Winter '26 previews)
- Salesforce Platform Roadmap (DevOps and security focus)
- Sales Cloud Winter '26 features
- Communications and Commerce releases

## Release Resources
- Trailhead Module: Spring '26 Release Highlights learning trail
- Release in a Box: PDF deck highlighting major features
- Release Readiness Series: Video demonstrations hosted by Carolyn Bathauer on Salesforce+
- Release Readiness Trailblazer Community group for peer discussions and Q&A
- Latest seasonal release blogs on Salesforce blog platform

## Product Demo Collections
- Core Products: Slack, Sales, Service, Field Service, Agentforce, Commerce, Marketing, Revenue Management, Flow, Analytics
- Industry-Specific: Automotive, Communications, Consumer Goods, Education, Health, Nonprofit

## Release Cadence
Three major updates annually: Winter, Spring, Summer
Some products now ship monthly updates beyond seasonal releases.

## Support Resources
- Spring '26 Release Notes (official documentation)
- Winter '26 and Summer '25 Release Notes (historical reference)
- FAQ section covering preparation, adoption, and troubleshooting strategies

## Governance & Compliance
Platform roadmap includes strengthened ALM and security features, with emphasis on DevOps improvements and data protection enhancements.
